pi_items.source: Confirmed via Image.sc Forum and ImageJ documentation - Blobs sample is a built-in sample image in Fiji

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image, a standard 25KB built-in sample in Fiji/ImageJ accessible via File > Open Samples > Blobs. The task requires comparing at least 4 different automatic thresholding methods (minimum 4 required) from Fiji's Auto Threshold plugin, which includes methods such as Otsu, Triangle, Li, Huang, MaxEntropy, Yen, and others. Results must be saved to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/threshold_comparison.csv. The known_methods list contains 16 method names (default, huang, intermodes, isodata, li, maxentropy, mean, minerror, minimum, moments, otsu, percentile, renyientropy, shanbhag, triangle, yen), which represent a core subset of ImageJ's available thresholding algorithms.
